hero.heading: Welcome to Luke's International Fellowship & Enrichment - LIFE

sections.body: <font size="3" color="#000000">We are a faith-based, non-profit network of Christian healthcare professionals dedicated to serving God and fulfilling the Great Commission. Rooted in Christian values, LIFE engages in medical missions, health education, community outreach, holistic well being and spiritual discipleship — bringing healing, hope, and transformation to individuals and communities worldwide.</font>
sections.title: About Luke's International Fellowship & Enrichment - LIFE

sections.body: To share the gospel of Jesus Christ through healthcare. It aims to strengthen healthcare professionals in their walk with God, equip them with the skills of an Evangelist, and provide opportunities to be an effective witness of Jesus Christ.
sections.title: Our Mission

items.name: Medical Missions
items.description: Local and overseas, bringing clinical services to the poor and undeserved in partnership with communities, hospitals and medical schools.

items.name: Spiritual Fellowship
items.description: Provide services that encourage, strengthen and foster a community of Christian healthcare professionals.

items.name: Medical Education
items.description: Mentoring through individual and group sessions, seminars for continuing medical education, scholarships and medical training opportunities both locally and internationally.

sections.title: Some glimpses of our medical mission

sections.body: When you support us, you’re not just giving – you’re healing, you’re lifting, you’re standing in the gap for those who are unseen and unheard. Your help becomes a hand to the sick, a voice to the voiceless, and hope to the hopeless. Be the miracle someone is praying for today.
sections.title: Support us

sections.body: Duncan Hospital experience
sections.title: Blog Insights

items.answer: LIFE is a Christ-centered mission with a primary focus on medical outreach and compassionate care. We organize medical camps, health support initiatives, and humanitarian aid for underserved communities, while also providing spiritual encouragement and discipleship. Alongside healthcare outreach, we conduct Bible teaching, mentorship programs, and mission partnerships that bring both physical healing and spiritual hope. Our mission is to serve people holistically — body, mind, and spirit.
items.question: What services does Luke's International Fellowship & Enrichment - LIFE offer?

items.answer: You can get involved with LIFE by partnering with our medical outreach and mission programs. Volunteers, healthcare professionals, supporters, and prayer partners are all welcome. Simply reach out through our contact page to join an outreach team, sponsor a project, or participate in our fellowship and training programs. We’ll guide you in finding the best way to serve and make an impact.
items.question: How can I get started?

items.answer: What makes LIFE unique is our integration of medical care and Christ-centered mission. We combine practical healthcare support with spiritual mentorship and discipleship. Our outreach is driven by compassion, faith, and long-term community impact — not just short-term aid. We aim to build relationships, restore dignity, and share hope through both healing service and the message of Christ.
items.question: What makes you different?

sections.body: Ready for a hand with Luke's International Fellowship & Enrichment - LIFE? We'd love to hear from you.
sections.title: Get In Touch

sections.body: Luke’s International Fellowship and Enrichment, Inc is a nonprofit corporation of Christian health care professionals that is organized exclusively for religious, educational, and charitable purposes as defined under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. The purpose of this organization is to bring healing to the body and Spirit by delivering medical care and sharing the good news of the gospel of Jesus Christ. We seek to accomplish these ends by mobilizing resources and medical expertise both in the United States and around the world with a special focus on the South Asian subcontinent.The objectives of this corporation are to foster the spiritual growth of Christian health care professionals, promote the development of health care professionals to be effective witnesses of Jesus Christ, conduct and support short and long term medical missions both locally and internationally, provide continuing medical education for healthcare medical professionals germane to the objectives of this corporation,promote public health efforts directly and by dissemination of medical literature both independently and in collaboration with other like-minded institutions, provide networking opportunities for like-minded individuals to greater fulfill the objectives of LIFE.The individual and summative effect of these objectives will be to improve the health and health awareness of those we serve and to fulfill the Great Commission as directed by Jesus Christ.
sections.title: About Us

sections.body: LIFE aims to strengthen Christian health care professionals in their walk with God, equip them with the skills to be an evangelist for Christ in healthcare, and provide opportunities for them to be an effective witness of Jesus Christ.
sections.title: The Mission of LIFE is to share the gospel of Jesus Christ through Healthcare
Premium Quality • Expert Service • Outstanding Results

sections.body:
We Believe:
  • In one God eternally existing in three persons: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit.
  • That Jesus Christ is the only begotten Son of the Father, conceived of the Holy Ghost, and born of the Virgin Mary.
  • That Jesus was crucified, buried, and raised from the dead; that He ascended to heaven and is today at the right hand of the Father as the Intercessor.
  • In the personality of the Holy Spirit, and that as promised, He came down from Heaven on the day of Pentecost, to dwell permanently in each believer, and that He is the efficient power for godly living, Christian service, and spiritual worship.
  • In the Divine inspiration and authority of the Holy Scriptures.
  • That all have sinned and come short of the glory of God.
  • That justification and sanctification of the believer through the finished work of Christ.
  • In water baptism by immersion, and all who repent should be baptized in the name of the Father, and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit.
  • In the Lord’s Supper.
  • In the baptism of the Holy Spirit for believers.
  • In Divine healing provided for all in the atonement.
  • That God wonderfully and immutably creates each person as male or female. These two distinct, complementary genders together reflect the image and nature of God. Rejection of one’s biological sex is a rejection of the image of God within that person.
  • In a marriage between one man and one woman in a single, exclusive union. We believe that God intends sexual intimacy to occur only between a man and a woman who are married to each other. 
  • We believe that God has commanded that no intimate sexual activity be engaged in outside of marriage between a man and a woman.
  • That all human life is sacred and created in His image. That human life is of priceless worth in all its dimensions, including pre-born babies, the aged, the physically or mentally challenged, and every other stage or condition from conception through natural death, That we are therefore called to defend, protect and value all human life.
  • That any form of sexual immorality (including adultery, fornication, homosexual behavior, bisexual conduct, bestiality, incest, and use of pornography) is sinful and offensive to God.
  • In the second coming of Jesus Christ.
  • In the bodily resurrection; eternal life for the righteous and eternal punishment for the wicked.
  • In the millennial reign of Jesus Christ and in the new heavens and new earth.

sections.title: Giving

sections.body:
As you may have heard, India is amid a crisis of the second wave of Covid which is 3.5 times higher than the peak of the first wave. The whole medical infrastructure has collapsed and India is in dire need of resources like oxygen concentrators that provide portable oxygen to all those affected by Covid 19. Many are dying due to a severe shortage in oxygen at hospitals and will benefit from 5 to 10 liters per minute (LPM) of oxygen supply.
 

We, at Luke’s International Fellowship and Enrichment (LIFE) have decided to partner with an organization called Friends of Agape based in Colorado Springs, CO that will help provide for these immediate oxygen needs through your generous giving.


Sometimes, we are not sure of how to make an impact around us with the resources we have. Supporting this cause is a great way to make sure that our light is “like a city on a hilltop that cannot be hidden. No one lights a lamp and then puts it under a basket. Instead, a lamp is placed on a stand, where it gives light to everyone in the house. In the same way, let your good deeds shine for all to see, so that everyone will praise your Heavenly Father” Matt 5:14-16. A little help will go a long way as we request that you prayerfully give to this cause to help alleviate the pain and desperation of our fellow brothers and sisters in India at this time. We hope that your small gesture of giving will be the light that turns India to Jesus!
Join us to help India by donating today!

sections.title: Cardiothoracic Surgery Mission Trip

sections.body:
This mission trip was a collaboration with Samaritans Purse in Bomet, Kenya. The hospital's busy services are Orthopedics, Cardiothoracic surgery, General surgery, Critical Care, and In-patient medicine/Pediatric

When: Sept 8-17, 2023
Where: Tenwek Hospital, Bomet, Kenya
Who: Trip was opened for Physicians, Fellows, Residents, and Physician Assistants
Cost: $3,500
sections.title: Impacted Kenya!
Video Story of Kenya Mission Trip!

sections.body:
Over the course of four days, we successfully treated over 600 patients. Additionally, we treated 30 abandoned children performed x-ray guided pain procedures, assisted with spine surgery, observed  open-heart surgery, lectured to university medical students and faculty and taught medical students, but above all, we brought the gospel of Christ to the unreached.

His name be glorified! Christ is All!
sections.title: Reaching the unreached

sections.body: https://www.youtube.com/embed/qWb3cIgjgKc

sections.body:
This India Missions trip will be from October 12-24th. It’ll be a collaborative effort with ICPF and their hospital in Wayanad. Services are adults and paediatric primary care clinics with accommodation on site. The team is looking for 20 professionals to join this trip.

When: October 12-24th, 2023
Where: Wayanad, India
Cost: $1,200 for travel + $1,000 for accommodation, transportation, and food ($2,200 total)
